sentences.arabic: كَانَ طِفْلٌ اسْمُهُ عُمَرُ يُحِبُّ النَّجُومَ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Bio je dječak po imenu Omer koji je jako volio zvijezde.
sentences.translationEn: There was a boy named Omar who loved stars very much.

sentences.arabic: كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ كَانَ يَجْلِسُ عَلَى السَّطْحِ وَيَنْظُرُ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Svake večeri je sjedio na terasi i gledao u nebo.
sentences.translationEn: Every night he sat on the roof and looked at the sky.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى لَهُ أَبُوهُ مِنْظَارًا صَغِيرًا لِيَرَى النُّجُومَ أَكْثَرَ.
sentences.translation: Otac mu je kupio mali teleskop da više vidi zvijezde.
sentences.translationEn: His father bought him a small telescope to see the stars better.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحَ عُمَرُ فَرَحًا كَبِيرًا وَشَكَرَ أَبَاهُ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Omer se veoma obradovao i mnogo se zahvalio ocu.
sentences.translationEn: Omar was very happy and thanked his father many times.
